# Papamoa.info

> Pāpāmoa's independent local business directory - owned and operated by PlainBlack on behalf of Carwyn / Dot Info Marketing Ltd. Sister site to TaurangaNZ.info (established 2005). Every listing is researched and written by the editorial team, not user-submitted.

## What this site is for

Papamoa.info is the local-business-discovery directory for Pāpāmoa, Bay of Plenty, New Zealand. Visitors come here to find a trusted local cafe, mechanic, plumber, accommodation provider, surf school or other business in the Pāpāmoa area, plus essential community information (weather, schools, rubbish day, events, beaches, walks).

The directory has two roles. For residents and visitors, it's a curated, editorially-researched local guide. For Pāpāmoa businesses, it's a paid listing service with two tiers (Silver, Gold) and an optional Menu Add-On.

## Editorial stance

- Every listing is written by the editorial team in third-party voice. Never first-person ("we / us / our").
- Listings are specific and honest - they include genuine strengths AND honest nuances. No listing is purely promotional.
- Spelling: Pāpāmoa (with macron) in body content. Domain name: Papamoa.info (no macron).
- Geographic scope: the suburb of Pāpāmoa within Tauranga City, Bay of Plenty, New Zealand.

## Structure of the site

- Homepage: `/homepage.html` - overview, search, category cards, weather, community highlights
- Five main category pages:
  - Accommodation: `/categories/accommodation/accommodation.html`
  - Activities: `/categories/activities/entertainment.html`
  - Food & Drink: `/categories/food-drink/food-and-drink.html`
  - Services: `/categories/services/services.html`
  - Shops: `/categories/shops/shopping.html`
- 50+ Community & Info pages under `/community/` covering: weather, schools, fishing, walks, beaches, parks, real estate, weddings, fuel prices, rubbish & recycling, emergency services, and more.
- 20 business listing pages under `/listings/` (e.g., `/listings/karaka-pines-papamoa.html`).
- Search: `/search.html`
- Privacy & Terms: `/legal.html`

## Business listing tiers (locked)

| Tier | Price (NZD) | What's included |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| Silver Listing | $599+gst/yr | Logo + 1 image, written by editorial team, full description, contact details, opening hours, social links |
| Gold Listing | $1,199+gst/yr | Silver + up to 9 hero gallery images, Menu Add-On included free, first Spotlight position included in their sub-category |
| Menu Add-On | $199+gst/yr | Silver paid add-on (free with Gold). Interactive menu / service list with dietary filters and order-online link |
| Extra Spotlight | $199+gst/yr each | Gold only. Premium top-of-sub-category placement, one business per sub-category. |

All listings come with a Lifetime Price Lock - renewal price stays the same as long as the business renews consecutively.

## Operator

- Built by: PlainBlack (plainblackcreative.com)
- Operated on behalf of: Carwyn / Dot Info Marketing Ltd (dotinfomarketing.co.nz)
- Sister site: TaurangaNZ.info (established 2005, 20-year domain age)
- Hosting: GitHub Pages (static HTML), Cloudflare Worker for dynamic data (weather, fishing forecasts, search-visibility checker)
- Forms: pb-forms Cloudflare Worker, delivered to info@plainblackcreative.com via Resend

## Contact

- Public: jayden@papamoa.info · 027 533 2970
- Facebook: facebook.com/papamoa.info
- For listings or directory enquiries, use the contact form at `/sales/list-with-us.html`

## Trust signals

- 20+ years of Bay of Plenty domain authority through the TaurangaNZ.info sister network
- Editorial content written and verified by the team, not user-generated
- Every listing has phone, address, and verified opening hours where applicable
- LocalBusiness schema on every listing page (JSON-LD)
- FAQ schema on category and community pages where appropriate
